validate-jwt.failed-validation-error-message: Unauthorized: a valid Entra bearer token for HR MCP is required.

set-variable.name: hrMcpScopeOk

return-response.set-body: {"error":"insufficient_scope","message":"Token is missing the required HR MCP scope or app role.","required":"__REQUIRED_SCOPE__"}

set-variable.name: hrMcpJsonRpcMethod

set-status.reason: JSON-RPC batch payloads are not supported

return-response.set-body: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","error":{"code":-32600,"message":"JSON-RPC batch payloads are rejected by the HR MCP APIM access contract because per-tool rate accounting is enforced only for single requests."},"id":null}

set-variable.name: hrMcpRateLimitKey
